task_completion.description: Perform a Max Intensity Z-Projection on the chromosome channel of mitosis.tif.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji image window titled 'MAX_mitosis.tif' (or similar) showing a 2D projection of the nuclei/chromosomes.

task_completion.description: Configure TrackMate with a LoG or DoG detector, blob diameter ~8.0, and threshold 2.0-5.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: TrackMate GUI wizard showing 'LoG detector' or 'DoG detector' selected, with the 'Estimated blob diameter' field set to ~8.0 and 'Threshold' set between 2.0 and 5.0.

task_completion.description: Configure the Simple LAP tracker with linking max distance 10.0, gap-closing max distance 10.0, and max frame gap 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: TrackMate GUI wizard showing 'Simple LAP tracker' selected, with 'Linking max distance' set to 10.0, 'Gap-closing max distance' set to 10.0, and 'Max frame gap' set to 2.

task_completion.description: Execute the tracking pipeline to produce tracks for dividing nuclei/chromosomes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Image window showing colored track lines overlaid on the moving/dividing nuclei, with at least 5 distinct tracks visible.
TrackMate statistics window open with a save dialog pointing to 'track_statistics.csv' in the correct directory, or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists.

task_completion.description: Save a visual overlay of the tracks to ~/Fiji_Data/results/tracking/tracks_visual.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ImageJ save dialog saving 'tracks_visual.png' in the correct directory, or a file manager/terminal showing the saved image file.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji/TrackMate GUI to perform the tracking.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TrackMate wizard steps being actively interacted with, rather than just running a terminal script.

integrity.description: The exported CSV and PNG files were generated via TrackMate's built-in export/capture features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TrackMate statistics table and capture overlay features are visible in the screenshots prior to saving, proving the outputs were not manually mocked.

integrity.description: The agent processed the actual mitosis.tif image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image window title shows 'mitosis.tif' (or 'MAX_mitosis.tif') and the visual content matches dividing nuclei.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input image is a 5D hyperstack (mitosis.tif) with 2 channels, 5 Z-slices, and 51 time points. The task requires tracking at least 5 nuclei/chromosomes. The expected outputs are '~/Fiji_Data/results/tracking/track_statistics.csv' and '~/Fiji_Data/results/tracking/tracks_visual.png'.
